9:00AM, DEPT 1, JUDGE DESMOND. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFENDANTS FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIMBO, RONNIE BIMBO, PEGGY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2249 POLK ST, S.F, CA. $4,147.01 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,897.01, LEASE FORFEITED
